title: Keyword-style `from` with multiple clauses
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.trending_posts/1` using the keyword-style `from(...)` syntax. Filter published posts with `view_count >= 100`, order by `view_count desc`, limit to `^n`. Use ONLY the keyword form, no pipe composition. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Keyword-style with multiple clauses — style exercise, tests that multi-clause `where:` is understood.
